title: Daoist Canon: Xisheng Jing (Western Ascension) (Section 6)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Xisheng Jing (Western Ascension)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Xisheng Jing (Western Ascension)

translation.text: From the Xisheng Jing (Western Ascension) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
